issues.note: Appropriately flagged as unresolvedItems. Step text says 'full set' but this is a 4-piece armor set. Correct decision not to map to single IDs without explicit breakdown.

notes: Mapping is accurate and complete. Both quest IDs (THE_SLUG_MENACE, LUNAR_DIPLOMACY) are actively progressed in this step, not merely mentioned. All 25 mapped items correctly correspond to step requirements: teleport runes, quest-specific consumables/tools (essence pouches, rune pickaxe, seal of passage, astral/cosmic runes, abyssal book, chisel), and commerce items (adamant chainbody). AbstractItems correctly uses 'cash stack' (genuine abstraction). Quantities are appropriately null where vague. No wrong IDs or tier mismatches detected.
